---
title: "ANOVA - Medidas repetidas"
description: |
  Medidas repetidas en un analisis de varianza.
categories: [R, Normalidad, Transformation]
author:
  - name: Franklin Santos
    url: https://www.franklinsantosm.com
    affiliation: Universidad Austral de Chile
    orcid: 0000-0002-7509-2910
    email: franklin25santos@gmail.com
date: "2025-01-06"
image: fs.png
citation: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{=html}
<style>
body {
text-align: justify}
</style>
```

## Introducción
